critical_absences: Haaland (MCI, FWD, bench slot 13) — CONFIRMED UNAVAILABLE GW38. Rested by Guardiola for World Cup load management. FPL UNAVAILABLE flag is accurate. 15.1m asset, 0 points GW38.

Gabriel (ARS, DEF, slot 2, starter) — CONFIRMED OUT, season over. Hamstring surgery confirmed by Arsenal in April 2026. FPL DOUBTFUL flag is critically misleading — he is OUT for remainder of 2025-26 and into 2026-27 pre-season. Automatic sub (Munoz) should activate.
Raya (ARS, GK, slot 1, starter) — CONFIRMED UNAVAILABLE GW38. Arsenal wholesale rotation post-title — Arteta did not select Raya in matchday squad. Not injury. Sels (bench GK) is the backup.
deadline_watches: Gabriel vs Munoz auto-sub: Gabriel (starter, slot 2) is OUT. Munoz (bench DEF, slot 14) should auto-sub in. Confirm bench order ensures Munoz is first-off-bench DEF ahead of deadline.
Raya vs Sels: Raya (GK starter) rested by Arsenal. Sels (bench GK, slot 12) is the only GK cover and should activate automatically — no action needed unless Sels has a late fitness concern.

NFO triple rotation risk: Aina (slot 4), Anderson (slot 8), Wood (slot 11) all start from Forest in a potential dead rubber. Monitor Forest final team news — any late rotation on all three could cascade badly.
Haaland on bench: Already in bench slot 13, FPL shows UNAVAILABLE — no auto-sub risk from Haaland. He scores 0.
